ground_truth.title: AI & Machine Learning Staffing & Solutions | The Judge Group
ground_truth.main_content: The Judge Group offers AI & Machine Learning staffing and solutions designed to help organizations transform data into business intelligence. At The Judge Group, we understand that artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) are leading-edge technologies that can bring about significant changes in the way modern businesses operate. From natural language processing to predictive modeling and robotics, there are dozens of AI and ML applications businesses can master to get ahead. Judge works closely with organizations to uncover their technology needs and engineer ML and AI business solutions tailored to deliver against business priorities. Why Judge? Three key differentiators: Investments in Internal Technology - Judge uses AI, ML, and predictive analytics tools in their own business to quickly build candidate pipelines and decrease turnaround time on talent placement. Access to Niche Skill Sets - Judge's candidate database contains cross-functional IT experts with specific AI and ML skill sets, including augmented reality (AR) and virtual reality (VR), robotic process automation (RPA), computer vision and image processing, and more. Proven Track Record of Success - Judge provides AI consulting services to companies large and small, including household brand names and Fortune 100 enterprises. Services offered: ML & AI Staffing Solutions - Judge places AI- and ML-focused positions including AI Architects, Data Architects, AI Solution Scientists, ML Engineers, ML and Modeling Engineers, AI and ML Researchers, AI Developers, Native Language Processing (NLP) Engineers, AI Ethics Consultants, Robotics Engineers, AI Technical Writers, and ML Software Engineers. Learning & Development Solutions - Judge designs and delivers training programs covering AI and ML Fundamentals, ML Learning Algorithms, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Computer Vision, and Ethics and Governance in AI. AI Consulting Solutions - Judge provides consultative guidance on AI and ML implementations including Strategy and Road Mapping, Development and Deployment, Data Science Environment, Predictive Modeling, Complete MLOps, and Chatbots and in-Database Learning.
with: Transform data into business intelligence with our ML & AI business solutions.
Without the proper talent, training, and technology resources, organizations cannot leverage the power of AI and ML to drive growth, productivity, and innovation.
Judge provides AI consulting services to companies large and small, including household brand names and Fortune 100 enterprises.

Our candidate database is full of cross-functional IT experts with specific AI and ML skill sets, including augmented reality (AR) and virtual reality (VR), robotic process automation (RPA), computer vision and image processing, and much more.
Deploying ML and AI business solutions isn't a light lift, especially for organizations with limited in-house IT expertise.
